pi_items.source: Code analysis: export_result.sh:33 defines LOG_A with identical path
Code analysis: export_result.sh:18 defines LOG_B with identical path
Code analysis: export_result.sh:68 defines REPORT_PATH with identical path
OpenICE supported devices (devs.md): Lists 'infusion pumps' as supported simulated therapeutic device
OpenICE supported devices (devs.md): Lists 'capnometer' as supported simulated monitoring device

privileged_info_summary: OpenICE (Open-source Integrated Clinical Environment) is a real, publicly available medical device interoperability platform distributed via GitHub (https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp). The task tests multi-node communication by running two OpenICE Supervisor instances on the same machine. Node A creates a simulated Infusion Pump and Node B creates a simulated Capnometer. Both device types are officially supported simulated devices in OpenICE. Logs are generated at /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log (Node A) and /home/ga/Desktop/node_b.log (Node B). The interoperability test verifies DDS (Data Distribution Service) cross-discovery between the two instances. All data is synthetically generated via running simulated medical devices, not from external real-world medical data sources.
